capabilities: Combine CQRS with meta protocol-derived knowledge to enhance system evaluation, ensuring robust error handling and performance metrics.

procedure.action: Compose meta protocol-derived knowledge into the CQRS architecture by mapping protocol outputs to command and query responsibilities; ensure mappings are consistent with domain models by composing module interfaces via adapter pattern; assert input/output type contracts match before connecting; assert integration_error_count < 1 after contract validation.
Execute a comprehensive test suite on the CQRS system, including edge cases derived from meta protocols; assert that error_count < 1 for all test cases.

Log operation_duration_ms and result_code for each command and query execution to an audit trail; ensure logs are accessible for post-mortem analysis using domain-appropriate tooling; assert error_count < 1 and result_valid = true; log operation_duration_ms and result_code to audit trail.

Specify success criteria and performance metrics using domain-specific tools; include thresholds for latency and throughput based on historical data by specifying schema, constraints, and invariants in machine-readable form; include at least one falsifiable acceptance criterion where error_rate < 0.001.
Run performance benchmarks on the CQRS system under simulated load conditions; assert that latency_p95 < 200ms and throughput > 1000 requests/second.

summary: Evaluate CQRS architectures by integrating meta protocol-derived knowledge bases, focusing on error minimization and operational efficiency.
title: CQRS Architecture Evaluation

failureConditions: Inconsistent command and query results when meta protocol mappings are incorrect, causing data divergence across read and write models.
High error rates when test suite lacks coverage for edge cases derived from meta protocols, leading to unhandled exceptions in production.
Performance degradation when logging mechanisms are not optimized, causing increased latency and reduced throughput under load.
metrics: input/output type contracts match before connecting
that error_count < 1 for all test cases
successConditions: operation_duration_ms logged for all executions; assert error_rate < 0.001 and operation_completed = true.
